1|i0e8gr: 08/Feb/26 4:08 PM *Steps tor reproduce:*

# Login as Recruiter - Myrtle Will
# Open a clinician person account having Employee type clinician contract in ‘Executed’ status
# Click ‘Contract Request’ button
# Select Employee Type as ‘Employee’ and click ‘Next’ button
# ‘Employee’ executed contract’s start and date date should be pre-populated
# Update the start date with a value 10 days after the executed contract’s end date and end date as another future date and click ‘Next’ button

*Expected Result:*

Start and end date of previous executed contract of same employment type should remain the same

*Actual Result:*

End date of previous executed contract of same employment type is updated as start date - 1 of the newly created clinician contract in ‘Draft’ status

Regression_Bug - End Date of Executed contract updated when a new Draft contract of same employment type is created

 Karthika D 0 Karthika D Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 09/Sep/25 10:58 AM   2 image-20250908-144714.png 08/Sep/25 10:47 AM SCP Sprint 8 09/Sep/25 12:25 AM Extra permissions needed for Legal - Client Contracting role
Requirements: Incomplete Requirements
1|i0e7zn: 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM *Description:*
When attempting to set *Contract Status = Executed* for a *Letter of Intent (LOI)* request, the system displays a permission error:
_“You don’t have permission to activate Contracts. Ask your Salesforce admin for help.”_

As per *Acceptance Criteria 3 (AC3)*, when the Legal - Client Contracting team closes the LOI request with *Status = Executed*, the related *Opportunity (RT: Growth Opportunity)* field *LOI Complete* should be updated to *True/Checked*. Currently, this flow is blocked due to the permission error.

*Steps to Reproduce:*

# Log in to Salesforce QA Sandbox as a user with Legal - Client Contracting role.
# Navigate to an existing *Contract record* (Record Type = Letter of Intent).
# Attempt to update *Status = Executed*.
# Click *Save*.

*Expected Result:*

* System should allow saving with *Status = Executed*.
* Related Opportunity (Source Opportunity) should automatically update *LOI Complete = True*.

*Actual Result:*

* Save fails with error:
_“You don’t have permission to activate Contracts. Ask your Salesforce admin for help.”_
* Opportunity field *LOI Complete* is not updated.

test data

[00003702 | Contract | Salesforce|https://corehc--qa.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contract/800gP000005678nQAA/view]

!image-20250908-144714.png|width=1422,height=800,alt="image-20250908-144714.png"!

Unable to mark LOI Contract as Executed – Permission Error

None

 Karthika D 0 Karthika D Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 09/Sep/25 1:06 AM   2 image-20250908-125440.png 08/Sep/25 8:52 AM SCP Sprint 8 09/Sep/25 12:23 AM Design flaw as the “Initiate Contracting Request” button will stay visible irrespective of the status of the proforma model
Design: Design Flaws
1|i0e7tv: 30/Sep/25 4:49 AM *Description:*
On the *Opportunity (RT: Growth Opportunity)* record, the *Initiate Contracting Request* button is available even when the *Pro Forma Status* field is blank. As per requirements, the button should only be available when *Pro Forma Status = “Model Confirmed” or “Approved for Contracting.”*

*Steps to Reproduce:*

# Log in to Salesforce QA Sandbox.
# Navigate to an *Opportunity (RT: Growth Opportunity)* record.
# Ensure *Pro Forma Status = blank*.
# Observe that the *Initiate Contracting Request* button is visible.

*Expected Result:*
The *Initiate Contracting Request* button should *not be visible* when *Pro Forma Status ≠ Model Confirmed / Approved for Contracting*.

*Actual Result:*
The *Initiate Contracting Request* button is *visible* even when Pro Forma Status is blank.

*Impact:*

* Users may attempt to create an LOI Request without meeting prerequisites.

Test data

[https://corehc--qa.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006gP000002FHiYQAW/view|https://corehc--qa.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006gP000002FHiYQAW/view|smart-link]

!image-20250908-125440.png|width=1422,height=800,alt="image-20250908-125440.png"!

Initiate Contracting Request button visible even when Pro Forma Status is blank

1|i0e65f: 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM *Steps to reproduce:*

# Login as Recruiter - Myrtle Will
# Open a clinician contract whose related Service account has a Practice Operations contract. Practice Operations contract should have rate values configured for Bonus
# From Summary tab of clinician contract, click ‘Configure Rates’ button
# Select the Type of Rate as ‘Bonus’ and click ‘Next’ button
# Select a Type from the multi-picklist field
# Enter values for all required fields and more than 3 digits for below fields and click ‘Finish’ button
#* *Payroll Cycle* (number, 2 digits 0 decimals)
#* *Duration Months* (number, 2 digits 0 decimals)
#* *Work Commitment per Month* (number, 3 digits 0 decimals)

*Expected Result:*

User should not be allowed to enter more than the mentioned digits or get an error message when ‘Finish’ button is clicked

*Actual Result:*

User is allowed to enter more than the mentioned digits and click ‘Finish’ button. But the additional rate is not getting saved. Ideally they should get an error when entering more than the allowed number of digits

User allowed to enter more than the required digits in the new Bonus fields

1|i0e63v: 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM Steps to Reproduce:-
1-Login as SFO into the Corp HC Org and navigate to the Corporate Support App.
2-From app launcher search for Account object and open a Service Account record.
3-Navigate to related tab and open the Client Contract record where Status = Draft.
4-Navigate to Summary tab and select Specify Rate button.
5-​Select Type of Rate ​as Shift and a Single Shift Type is displayed with values - NP/PA, MD/DO, RN/LPN.
6-Verify if NP/PA is selected under Shift Type then Employment Type field is displayed with Employed and Other values.
7-Select the values and click on next and verify Shift records are not being displayed.

Note - Upon selecting any type of shift type the shifts records are not being displayed, even Shift records are present on Practice Operations record.

Issue - The Shifts records are not being displayed under the Specify Rates flow on Practice Operation record.
Expected Result - The Shifts records should be displayed under the Specify Rates flow on Practice Operation record.
Actual Result - The Shifts records are not being displayed under the Specify Rates flow on Practice Operation record.

The Shifts records are not being displayed under the Specify Rates flow on Practice Operation record.

 resitha.s 0 resitha.s 1 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 08/Sep/25 11:19 AM   2 05/Sep/25 9:33 AM SCP Sprint 8 08/Sep/25 1:53 AM In Flow, we were fetching all Services linked to Opportunity. Needed to update to fetch only Active Services on Opportunity.
Coding: Logic Errors
1|i0e5k3: 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM *Steps to reproduce:*

# Login as Sales VP - Jay Gatsby
# Open a Opportunity Growth RT opportunity record
# Opportunity should satisfy all below conditions
## Questions Due Back To Client (RFP/RFI)
## INFO DUE Date for All Inputs
## Targeted DAM Date
## Proposal Due Date
## Program Transition/Start Date (Est)
## Program Transition/Start Time (Est)
## Below deal members should be present for the opportunity
# Below deal team members should be present
## Role = Chief Medical Officer - EM [When the Service Line’s Parent field = EM or UC]
## Role = Chief Medical Officer - HM [When the Service Line’s Parent field = HM]
## Role = Recruiting Manager
## Role = BD Finance

 Karthika D 0 Karthika D Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 04/Sep/25 8:52 AM   2 image-20250904-125156.png 03/Sep/25 5:46 AM SCP Sprint 8 03/Sep/25 5:58 AM The required object permission for Sales VP was not included in the Design Document (DD), resulting in the missing access in the Sales VP permission set.
Design: Design Flaws, User Interface: Accessibility Issues
1|i0e16b: 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM h3. *Description:*

As a Sales VP, I need to request agreements for my clients so that contracts can be generated with all necessary information for SCP to provide services.

Per the acceptance criteria for the Opportunity layout (record type = Growth Opportunity), the *Right Region* should display the following tabs:

* Related
* Services
* Deal Team
* Contact Roles
* Opportunity Splits
* Opportunity Team (same as Deal Team)
* *Deal Workstreams*
* Notes
* Stage History
* Attachments
* Files (needed for story 1675)
* Approval History (own tab per story 1568)

Currently, the *Deal Workstreams* tab is *missing* in the right region.

h3. *Steps to Reproduce:*

# Log in as a Sales VP user in Corporate Support or Corporate Support Console apps.
# Navigate to an *Opportunity record* with record type = _Growth Opportunity_.
# Review the *Right Region tabs*.

h3. *Expected Result:*

The *Right Region* should include all required tabs, including *Deal Workstreams*.

h3. *Actual Result:*

The *Deal Workstreams tab is missing* from the Right Region in the Opportunity layout.

Test data

[https://corehc--qa.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006gP000003LwwvQAC/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F001gP0000056JRhQAM%2Fview|https://corehc--qa.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006gP000003LwwvQAC/view?ws=%2Flightning%2Fr%2FAccount%2F001gP0000056JRhQAM%2Fview|smart-link]

Opportunity Layout – Missing Deal Workstreams Tab in Right Region

10/Sep/25 12:04 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Offboarding Accepted   Low TADesignComplete Kristi Bouillion   PR1050558-2218, PR1050558-2223, PR1050558-2426, PR1050558-1708, PR1050558-2436 tapas.dey Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2450

 hinduja.goli PR1050558-2475, PR1050558-2519, PR1050558-2478 single place for IT to adjust time from 12 months (ex. to 6 months)

Create an apex batch job that runs daily. It will query all related sites for the clinician and then look for the HPF’s belonging to that sites. If the Last Worked Date is more tahn a year and newer that the other ones we proceed to inactivate.

Batch job on HPF
Query for HPF where Status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive. Get related Clinician records as well
Filter HPF by the following
Today - HPF.Last_Date_Worked__c >=12 months

NOTE
For *A clinician has never worked*:_If Last Date Worked is blank, check the Company Signed Date (aka Effective Date) on the Contract records for all sister sites,_

Sister sites relationship are captured in Account Account relatioship
Look for active contract that are older than a year, then see if the last date worked is blank

Check the same conditions for all other sites (using the AAR relationship) .. and if they are true we update
If any one of them do not satisfy the conditions( meaning active contract older than a year, but have the last date worked populated) we break/skip the update 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record
And I view a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record *where the following is true:*

* If the HPF Status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive
* *A clinician hasn’t worked in a year*:
** Last Date Worked (HPF) is more than 12 months away for all sister sites that a clinician works at (Account field on HPF where status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive)
* *A clinician has never worked*:
** If Last Date Worked (HPF) is blank, check the Company Signed Date (on Clinician Contract, aka Effective Date) on the Contract records for all sister sites
** If Last Date Worked (HPF) and Company Signed Date (Clinician Contract) are both blank, Hospital Privileged Date (HPF) is more than 12 months away for all sister sites

Then the HPF record is automatically updated with the following:

* Status = Inactive
* Credentialling Status = Inactive
* Termination Date = date when Last Date Worked is more than 12 months away

And the Clinician record is updated so that I-9 Status is blank

{color:#403294}*ITEMS ABOVE ARE BUILT IN* {color}[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1580|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1580|smart-link]{color:#403294} {color}

*for this user story:*

*And all open cases, child cases, tasks related child cases, & tasks related to the clinician are updated to Status = Closed* 		10/Sep/25 12:04 PM   5 image-20250821-105158.png 02/Sep/25 6:52 AM SCP Sprint 8, SCP Sprint 9 02/Sep/25 6:52 AM 1|i08pz4:qzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzv 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a Data Quality team member, I need clinicians to be inactivated if they haven’t worked in 12 months, so that our clinician data is clean 21/Aug/25

Enhanced Clinician Inactivation: Case and Task Closure

6. Change the Status as Executed in Contract record.

 stuti.jain 0 stuti.jain 1 QA Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 03/Sep/25 11:59 AM   2 01/Sep/25 5:04 AM SCP Sprint 8 03/Sep/25 8:41 AM Deployment Error

1|i0dz7n: 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM Steps to Reproduce:
1-Login as System Admin and navigate to the Clinician Record.
2-On Clinician Record, ensure HPF's are present as per visibility Conditions.
3-Navigate to highlight panel, click on the Login as Exp User button.
4-Portal will be displayed and on home page verify the Links under Helpful link section.

Issue - On basis of Visibility Condition below Links should be displayed.

(A) - Employed Information - It should be visible when HPF facility title has Employment Type - Employee and Status not equals to Inactive.
As of now HPF facility title has Employment Type - Employee and but Status equals to Inactive. Then in that case Employed Information link should be hidden but it is still displayed.

(B) - Contractor Resources - It should be visible when HPF facility title has Employment Type - Independent Contractor and Status not equals to Inactive.
As of now HPF facility title has Employment Type - Independent Contractor and but Status equals to Inactive. Then in that case Contractor Resources link should be hidden but it is still displayed.

(C) - Resident and Fellow Resources - It should be visible when clinician Professional Status - Resident or Fellow.
As of now, Clinician Professional Status - Practicing and still Resident and Fellow Resources link was displayed.

The Links should be visible on basis of Visibility Condition

None

Create an apex batch job that runs daily. It will query all related sites for the clinician and then look for the HPF’s belonging to that sites. If the Last Worked Date is more tahn a year and newer that the other ones we proceed to inactivate.

Batch job on HPF
Query for HPF where Status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive. Get related Clinician records as well
Filter HPF by the following
Today - HPF.Last_Date_Worked__c >=12 months

NOTE
For *A clinician has never worked*:_If Last Date Worked is blank, check the Company Signed Date (aka Effective Date) on the Contract records for all sister sites,_

Sister sites relationship are captured in Account Account relatioship
Look for active contract that are older than a year, then see if the last date worked is blank

Check the same conditions for all other sites (using the AAR relationship) .. and if they are true we update
If any one of them do not satisfy the conditions( meaning active contract older than a year, but have the last date worked populated) we break/skip the update 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record
And I view a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record *where the following is true:*

* If the HPF Status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive
* *A clinician hasn’t worked in a year*:
** Last Date Worked (HPF) is more than 12 months away for all sister sites that a clinician works at (Account field on HPF where status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive)
* *A clinician has never worked*:
** If Last Date Worked (HPF) is blank, check the Company Signed Date (on Clinician Contract, aka Effective Date) on the Contract records for all sister sites
** If Last Date Worked (HPF) and Company Signed Date (Clinician Contract) are both blank, Hospital Privileged Date (HPF) is more than 12 months away for all sister sites

Then the HPF record is automatically updated with the following:

* Status = Inactive
* Credentialling Status = Inactive
* Termination Date = date when Last Date Worked is more than 12 months away

And the Clinician record is updated so that I-9 Status is blank

09/Sep/25 2:50 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Contracting Accepted   Low BuildReviewComplete, TADesignComplete Lisa Kleyla   PR1050558-2649, PR1050558-2645, PR1050558-2657, PR1050558-1696, PR1050558-3384 muskan.jain Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2423
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-2425, PR1050558-2499, PR1050558-2506, PR1050558-2507 While cloning, for CPA - Convert Contract’s Date to Datetime field and use the generic time
For PCA, no need to create/populate start date and end date, as it does not exist on the object. 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Clinician record and open the Contract Request experience
And the Clinician *has an Executed Contract*
And selected: *Start From Previous Active Contract*
Then I am able to:

* specify Start Date
** date field, required
** *pre-populated with Executed Contract’s information; user can update*
* specify End Date
** date field, not required
** *pre-populated with Executed Contract’s information; user can update*
** If End Date was not populated and facility title is Nurse Practitioner or Physician Assistant then End Date on Contract and Provider Network Contract is Start Date + 365 (able to handle leap year scenario)
** _Note: there is no business use case for an IC contract having NP/PA and other facility titles in the same contract_

And if the user selects *“Start From Previous Active Contract”*, then

* The System will set the *Start Date & End Date* inputted on *all the cloned records*


-Given I am a Clinician Contracting Specialist in the Corporate Support apps-
-When a new clinician contract is updated so that Status = Executed-
-And this clinician has a prior Contract in Status = Active where Employment Type = same value as the newly executed contract-
-Then following updates occur automatically:-

* -Currently Active/Original Contract-
** -End Date = 1 day before Start Date of newly executed contract-
** -only update when End Date is blank, do not override-

 resitha.s 0 resitha.s Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 01/Sep/25 4:00 AM   1 26/Aug/25 12:23 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 8 Data Issue - HPF records in Inactive status causing exception
Data: Data Corruption
1|i0dpir: 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM *Steps to reproduce:*

# Login as Data Quality Team Member
# Open a HPF record in ‘Active’ status and ‘Last Date Worked’ older than 12 months
# HPF of sister site accounts with clinician same as initial HPF record should also have ‘Last Date Worked’ older than 12 months



*Expected Result:*

# HPF record should be updated as below
#* Status = Inactive
#* Credentialling Status = Inactive
#* Termination Date = date when Last Date Worked is more than 12 months away
# And the Clinician record is updated so that I-9 Status is blank
And all open cases and tasks related to the clinician are updated to Status = Closed

*Actual Result:*

# HPF record and related items are also not updated when there is no sister site
# HPF record and related items are also not updated when there is a siter site with HPFs having Last Date Worked is more than 12 months old

HPF status is not updated to Inactive status when LWD is more than 12 months for all sister sites

None
QA

Retrieve the Contact’s NPI information
when the NPI field from form does not match the Contact’s NPI
At the end, after the assessment record is created (as it is used as RelatedTo/WhatId)
Use IP to create task with details mentioned above.

If Data Quality queue does not exist, please create one. 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support apps
When an intake form is completed for a clinician where their Contact.NPI__c does not match the NPI provided on the intake form (Contact NPI can be blank or populated)
Then I am able to see that a task has been automatically created with the following information:

* Subject = Review Clinician NPI
* Record Type = Default
* Assigned To = Data Quality Queue
* Status = Open
* Due Date = 1 business day from automation start
* Type = Other
* Priority = Normal
* Name = clinician record
* Related To = assessment record (intake form) 		10/Sep/25 12:05 PM   3 26/Aug/25 11:47 AM SCP Sprint 8, SCP Sprint 9 05/Sep/25 9:38 AM 1|i08pz4:qzzzzzzzz 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM As a Data Quality team member, I need an automated task created when clinicians complete their intake form, so that I can have a reminder to review the information provided for accuracy and completeness

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2267, PR1050558-2323, PR1050558-2485 Create a Platform Event

* Name: Clinician Offboarding Request (Use same API name in Story - Integration Dependency)
** API Name: Clinician_Offboarding_Request__c
* Fields
** Type: Type__c, Text(200)
** Business Entity Name: Business_Entity_Name__c, Text(200)
** Global Provider Id: Global_Provider_Id__c, Text(200)
** Tax Id: Tax_Id__c, Text(200)
** Reason Description: Reason_Description__c, Text(32000)
** Employee ID: Employee_ID__c, Text(200)
** Termination Date: Termination_Date__c, Date
** Last Day of Work: Last_Day_of_Work__c, Date
** Primary Reason: Primary__Reason__c, Text(200)
** Pay Through Date: Pay_Through_Date__c, Date
** Rehireable: Rehireable__c, Checkox



Create or Update a Record Triggers Flow Case for *Created*

Condition: Record Type = Clinician Offboarding and Type = SCP is Created

* Update Contract lookup into Case
** SELECT Id from Contract where Employemnt_Type__c = “Employee” OR Employemnt_Type__c = “Independent Contractor” AND Status = “Executed” Order By CompanySignedDate DESC LIMIT 1
** Update Case.Contract__c = ContractId



Create or Update a Record Triggers Flow Case for *Update*

* Condition: Record Type = Clinician Offboarding and Type = SCP is updated so that Status = Closed and Closed Reason = Complete

# Case > Contract > Employee Type = “Employee” Then
## Create a Platform Event record Clinician_Offboarding__c
### Type = “Employee”
### Employee ID = Case.Contact.Employee_Id__c
### Termination Date = Case.Termination_Request_Date__c {color:#ff991f} {color}
### Last Day of Work = Case.Last_Day__c
### Primary Reason = Case.Reason_for_Termination__c
### Reason Description = Case.Description
### {color:#ff991f}Pay Through Date = Case.Last_Day__c - Review this logic {color}[~accountid:712020:7c226bec-924b-4638-a65d-349a3d91b34b] , [~accountid:712020:b8b82845-1665-49bb-bced-ce96d04329bd]
### Rehireable__c = Case.Rehireable__c
# Case > Contract > Employee Type = “Independent Contractor” Then
## {color:#ff991f}SELECT Corporate_Tax_ID__c, Corporation_Name__c FROM Corporation_and_Tax_Information__c WHERE Clinician__c = Case.ContactId AND Expiration_Date__c <> null AND Status__c = “Verified' ORDR BY Effective_Date__c DESC LIMIT 1 - Review this logic {color}[~accountid:712020:7c226bec-924b-4638-a65d-349a3d91b34b] , [~accountid:712020:b8b82845-1665-49bb-bced-ce96d04329bd]
## Create a Platform Event record Clinician_Offboarding__c
### Type = “Independent Contractor”
### Business Entity Name = {color:#ff991f}Corporation_Name__c{color} from STEP 2.a
### Global Provider Id = Case.Contact.Global_Provider_ID__c
### Tax Id = {color:#ff991f}Corporate_Tax_ID__c{color} from STEP 2.a
### Reason Description = Case.Description
### Primary Reason = Case.Reason_for_Termination__c
### Rehireable__c = Case.Rehireable__c 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am an Integration User in the HC org
When a case record where Record Type = Clinician Offboarding and Type = SCP is updated so that Status = Closed and Closed Reason = Complete
Create a custom Platform Event with the following:

* Platform Event, Name = Clinician Offboarding Request
** Type = “Terminate IC”
** Business Entity Name
** Global Provider Id
** Tax Id
** Primary Reason = Reason for Termination (Offboarding Case)
** Reason Description
*** -Values: Agreement Not Returned, Coverage Discontinued, Deceased, Hospital App Not Returned, Hospital Contract Termination, Insurance Expired, Past Issues with facility, PEP Not Returned, Per Hospital, Per Provider, Per Risk Manager, Privileges- – Split and moved to Story [+PR1050558-2462+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2462]
** insurance expiration date - view HPF value on Case
** privilege expiration date - view HPF value on Case
* Platform Event, Name = Clinician Offboarding Request
** Type = “Terminate EE”
** Employee ID
** Termination Date = Last Day (Offboarding Case)
** Last Day of Work = Last Date Worked (HPF, could be blank, if multiple use the most recent)
** Primary Reason = Reason for Termination (Offboarding Case)
** Reason Description = should not be different than Primary Reason, we don’t have a free text field for this built
** Pay Through Date = Pay Through Date (Offboarding Case)
** Rehireable = Eligible for Rehir

-Given I am a Corporate Support user in the Corporate Support apps- – Split and moved to Story [+PR1050558-2462+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2462]

* -Termination Request Date-
* -Last Day-
* -Pay Through Date (create this field to default to 'Last Day' but can be updated if needed)-
* -Reason for Termination - finalized list was provided via email JM to update-

1|i0dkxf: 08/Feb/26 4:06 PM *Steps to reproduce:*

# Login as Recruiter - Myrtle Will
# Open a Clinician contract record with start date (17 Aug 2025) greater than Client contract’s CPA Start Date (16 Aug 2025 11:45 pm)
# On the clinician contract, try to configure rates for the CPA mentioned in previous step

*Expected Result:*

User should be able to see the rate from the Client Contract CPA in clinician contract

*Actual Result:*

User sees message ‘No available rates’ even though CPA Client date is less than clinician start date. If the CPA Start Date is made 16 Aug 2025 7 pm, user is able to configure the rate

Regression Bug - Unable to configure rate on clinician record even though CPA Client date is less than clinician start date

|BD Finance Activities Begun
Help Text: Volume, Reimbursement, etc|Checkbox|
|Proposal / RFP Documents Started|Checkbox|

When I am on an Services record
Then on the Details tab I can see new section = “Info Due”, located under the “Pro Forma Details” section with the following fields: (see data dictionary for additional info)

|Service Line Coverage Model|Text Area (Rich) (131,072)|
|Coverage Model Completed By|Lookup to User|
|MD/DO W2 Rates - Recommended|Currency (16,2)|
|NPPA W2 Rates - Recommended|Currency (16,2)|
|CPM Rate - Recommended|Currency (16,2)|
|HPS Rate - Recommended|Currency (16,2)|
|Sign-on bonus/Retention Bonuses|Currency (16,2)|
|Medical Director Stipend|Currency (16,2)|
|Field Ops Leadership - Rate Approval|Checkbox| 		15/Sep/25 6:00 PM   4 image-20250822-232052.png 19/Aug/25 6:50 PM SCP Sprint 8, SCP Sprint 9 21/Aug/25 6:18 PM 1|i08pz4:qzzzv 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM As a Sales VP, I want to include fields need for our Info Due Process within our Opportunity and Services objects, so we have place to capture the information needed.

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-2276, PR1050558-2332, PR1050558-2248 Create a Record Triggered Flow in Pro_Forma_Model__c Object

Event: When a Record is Updated to the Status__c = Approved for Contracting

Create Contract Records

Query all Opportunity Service Record(s) for the Opportunity

Services__c.Opportunity__c = Pro_Forma_Model__c.Opportunity__c AND Services__c.Status__c = Active

Create Contract Record(s) based on all Opportunity Service Record(s) that are Active Status with Fields

* Contract Object
** Record Type = Practice Operations
** Owner = Pro_Forma_Model__c.Opportunity__r.Owner
** Status = Draft
** Account Name = Services__c.Account__c
** Source Opportunity = <Opportunity Related to the Pro Forma)



-Security Matrix:-

* -tab = Permission Set-
** -Permission set = Corporate Support, Add Read to Services-
** 11/3 - per Sakthi, we do NOT need read access on Services under the Corporate Support perm set. When I navigate to a clinician contract record where Status = Draft
And I select Configure Rates on the Summary tab
Then I am able to populate the following details for a Bonus Rate:

* Type (already built, multi-select, updated in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2430|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2430|smart-link] )
* *Payments* (picklist, required, available for all types)
** Values: 1 Payment, 2 Payments
* *Payroll Cycle* (number, 2 digits 0 decimals, required if 2 Payments is selected in Payments)
** Help Text: Months after milestone
* *Duration Months* (number, 2 digits 0 decimals, required)
* *Work Commitment per Month* (number, 3 digits 0 decimals, required)
* *Work Commitment Frequency* (picklist, required)
** Values: Shifts, Hours
* *Repayment Terms* (picklist, required)
** Values: Full, Pro Rata
* Rate (already built, no change)
* Unit Of Measure (already built, need to REMOVE for bonus only)

10/Sep/25 12:26 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Maintenance Accepted   Low BuildReviewComplete, TADesignComplete Kristi Bouillion   PR1050558-4954, PR1050558-4980, PR1050558-5090, PR1050558-5091, PR1050558-291, PR1050558-823, PR1050558-6235 Sakthi Kuppusamy Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2119

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2280, PR1050558-2336 New fields to be created: Certificate of Insurance Start, Certificate of Insurance Expiration, and Insurance Provided By, {color:#ff991f}Hospital Privilege Expiration Date {color}
FSL : MSL persona

Record triggered flow on HPF (new record creation)
Retrieve existing HPF records for the Clinician
Check if the practitionerId and accountid have the same value
Check if the End date of existing HPF is the one day before the Start date of new record (HPF)
If so, copy the values for the following fields from existing HPF record to new HPF record.
If more than one matching record exits, use the latest HPF that matches.
First_Clinical_Shift__c, Credentialling_Status__c , Temporary_Inactive_Reason__c, First_Scheduled_Date__c, , Hospital_Privileged_Date__c, {color:#ff991f} Hospital Privilege Expiration Date {color}

Retrieve existing HPF records for the Clinician
Check if the practitionerId and accountid have the same value
Check if the End date of existing HPF is the one day before the Start date of new record (HPF)
Get HPF that match the above criteria, if more than one, use the latest record.
If the Facility title on the newly created record is IC , and existing record is employee, or vice versa,

then , update the following fields on the new HPF with the same values as the matched HPF record.
Certificate of Insurance Start, Certificate of Insurance Expiration, and Insurance Provided By 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a MSL in the Corporate Support apps
When there is an existing Healthcare Practitioner Facility record for a clinician
And a new HPF record is created where:

* the Practitioner and Account fields have the same value as the existing record AND
* there is no gap between the Effective From of the new HPF and the Effective To of the original HPF

Then I am able to see that the First Clinical Shift (QGenda WF SOR), Credentialling Status (QGenda Cred SOR), Temporary Inactive Reason (QGenda Cred SOR), First Scheduled Date (Salesforce SOR), Hospital Privileged Date (QGenda Cred SOR), Hospital Privilege Expiration Date (QGenda Cred SOR) fields have the same value as the existing HPF record

And fields that are QGenda SOR can continue to be updated on the current HPF via integration as needed



Given I am a MSL in the Corporate Support apps
When there is an existing Healthcare Practitioner Facility record for a clinician
And a new HPF record is created where:

* the Practitioner and Account fields have the same value as the existing record AND
* there is no gap between the Effective From of the new HPF and the Effective To of the original HPF AND
* Facility Title changes from Employee to Independent Contractor OR Independent Contractor to Employee

Then I am able to see that the {color:#ff991f}Certificate of Insurance Start (date), Certificate of Insurance Expiration (date), and Insurance Provided By (picklist, values: copy from Corp org) {color}fields have the same value as the existing HPF record

* Note for testing:
** Locums/Leased to EE or IC - COI should be blank - JM to check onboarding task sheet and SF to create enhancement story if not covered
** IC/EE to Locums or Leased - COI should be blank 		10/Sep/25 12:26 PM   5 Screenshot 2025-09-01 at 11.41.12 AM.png 18/Aug/25 10:29 AM SCP Sprint 8, SCP Sprint 9 26/Aug/25 12:33 PM 1|i08pz4:qzzzzzzzzzzzzzz 18/Mar/26 12:02 PM As a MSL, I need clinicians to keep their First Clinical Shift and Credentialling Status when a new HPF is created for the same facility, so that accurate data can be tracked in Salesforce 29/Aug/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2283, PR1050558-2339, PR1050558-2494 Create a new obejct : Training. Create fields mentioned in DD ( for both Compliance and Proctorship sheets, ensure no duplicate fields are created)
Types: Proctorship, Compliance.
Use the type field to display the fields given in Compliance sheet and proctorship sheet in DD.

Create the new fields mentioned above in Training object in AC.
The fields should also be added to page layout
Access provided to Integration User 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am an Integration User
Then I can access the following fields:

* Object - specific to NP/PAs, can complete all or part of the items listed below
** Bootcamp Completion Date - new grad who hasn’t worked in EM OR a student, typically NP/PAs only, additional training through LITMOS, not normal to complete multiple times
** Bootcamp Enrollment Date - date
** Proctor Name - regional director of NP/PA services, can be specific to the site this isn’t a standard person, current state is a lookup to user object
** Proctor Site - connection to HPF, today is free text and can list multiple, future state only need one “anchor”
** Service Line - pull from Account on HPF record
** Proctorship Comments - free text to add more details, anyone able to add
** Proctorship Program Complete - Proctorship Program is the same as bootcamp
** Proctorship Program Participant - picklist Yes/No, are they a participant, implied in future by creating the record
** Skills Checklist Completion Date - Georgette or NP/PA team populates to document when provided passed off those items, date
** 30-day Evaluation Completion Date - document when evaluation happened, date
** 140 hrs/clinical w/proctor compl date - when completed 140 hours of work with proctor
** 140 hrs/solo w/proctor compl date - when completed 140 hours of solo shifts

Create Training object and layout - dynamic display based on Type = Proctorship or Compliance as described in data dictionary

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2292, PR1050558-2348 On the omniscript (used in story [701|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-701]), after the HPF are selected,

status is not Prospect or Inactive AND Employment Type is Locums
Then display the fields mentioned above in a table format for each of the HPF ( row)

On Termination Details step, display the following fields: (upon clicking edit, then user will be present all editable fields listed in the story. The initial display is just displaying common fields between this story and 306)

* Name
* Status
* Last Day
* Date Termination Received
0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Medical Staff Liaison in the Corporate Support apps
When I view a *Clinician* record
Then I am able to select Initiate Termination Request and see the following:

* Facility Selection - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-701|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-701|smart-link]
* Termination Details
** Answer each question below per facility (when HPF status is not Prospect or Inactive AND Employment Type is Locums):
*** Last Day (date, required)
**** Help Text: -agreed- Agreement termination date
*** Date Termination Received (date, required)
**** Help Text: date termination request was received
*** Termination Request Date (date, automatically captured)
**** Help Text: date termination request was submitted or automated
*** Voluntary Termination (checkbox, optional)
*** Reason for Termination (picklist dependent on Voluntary Termination, required when condition met)
**** picklist values to be provided - must align with Workday and Asymbl (why an open req was created due to clinician exit)

* Add new value for “Type” for the Task object (RT: Default)

!image-20250813-202533.png|width=667,height=666,alt="image-20250813-202533.png"!



AC1: Create/Reuse before-save Record triggered flow on Opportunity.

# When Opportunity, record type equal “Opportunity Growth”, “Client Questionnaire Status“ field is updated to “ Info Due Process Ready“ and review Opportunity Team Member are set. To know the Service Line we traverse Opportunity.Account.Service_Line__c
# Prevent Status update if any of the conditions is not satisfied

AC2: Create/Reuse a after save Record triggered flow on Opportunity and Use the decision matrix that was created as part of story (PR1050558-247) to create task.
Task Subject, RelatedTo (WhatId) , Assigned to and fill details according to this story.

AC3: Services__c object is child of Opportunity in a Master-Detail relationship. Use this to get if there are active Services via the Status field. Create/Reuse a record triggered flow and create the Task accordingly in a similar way as in previous aceptance criteria. 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Validation to update “Client Questionnaire Status” = Info Due Process Ready
Given I am a Sales VP in the Corporate Support Apps
When I update the Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth) field “Client Questionnaire Status” = Info Due Process Ready
Then the system will check that *ALL of the following Opportunity fields* are populated:

* Questions Due Back To Client (RFP/RFI)
* INFO DUE Date for All Inputs
* Targeted DAM Date
* Proposal Due Date
* Program Transition/Start Date (Est)
* Program Transition/Start Time (Est)

And *ALL the Deal Team members* are added to the Opportunity based on the related Services (status= Active):

* Role = Chief Medical Officer - EM
** When the Service Line’s Parent field = EM or UC
* Role = Chief Medical Officer - HM
** When the Service Line’s Parent field = HM
* -Role = Hybrid Care Leader-
** -When the Service Line’s Parent field = VH or CCARE-
* Role = Recruiting Manager
** Always, no extra criteria
* Role = BD Finance
** Always, no extra criteria
* Role = BD Enablement
** Always, no extra criteria

And if ALL of the opportunity field and Deal Team members are NOT MET, then:

* Prevent the user from updating/save “Client Questionnaire Status” = “Info Due Process Ready”
* Display the following error message: Please review Deal Team and/or Opportunity Info Due fields to ensure completeness.

And if ALL of the opportunity field and Deal Team members are MET, then:

* Allow the user to change and save “Client Questionnaire Status” = “Info Due Process Ready”


AC2: Auto create Info Due Tasks - Opportunity level
Given I am a Sales VP in the Corporate Support Apps
When I update the Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth) field “Client Questionnaire Status” = “Info Due Process Ready”
Then the system shall automatically create the following *Task record(s)*: Note: if there are more that one team member with the same Deal Team role, then create tasks for each team member within that role.

# Subject: Update Service Provider Rate Market Analysis
## Assigned To = Deal Team Role: Recruiting Manager
## Comments = On the Opportunity, please attach a copy of the ’Service Provider Rate Market Analysis' & update following field within the “Info Due” section: “Service Provider Rate Market Analysis - Loaded”
## Related To = <Opportunity>
# Subject: Start BD Finance Activities
## Assigned To = Deal Team Role: BD Finance
## Comments = On the Opportunity, please confirm finance is beginning proforma activities & update following field within the “Info Due” section: “BD Finance Activities Begun”
## Related To = <Opportunity>
# Subject: Proposal / RFP Documents Started
## Assigned To = Deal Team Role: BD Enablement
## Comments = On the Opportunity, once you have received details required to kickoff RFP/Proposal/Presentation activities please update following field within the “Info Due” section: “Proposal / RFP Documents Started”
## Related To = <Opportunity>

And all tasks are populated with:

# Record Type = Default
# Status = Open
# Priority = Normal
# Type = Info Due Process (NEW)
# Due Date = <date from field = “INFO DUE Date for All Inputs”>


AC3: Auto create Info Due Tasks - Services level
Given I am a Sales VP in the Corporate Support Apps
When I update the Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth) field “Client Questionnaire Status” = “Info Due Process Ready”
Then the system shall automatically create *one Task record per Services (status = Active)*: Note: if there are more that one team member with the same Deal Team role, then create tasks for each team member within that role.
(example: if there are 5 active services w/one person per Deal Team Role, then I expect 10 tasks)

# Subject: Update Service Line Coverage Model & Approve Rate(s)
## Assigned To = Deal Team Role: Chief Medical Officer - EM, Chief Medical Officer - HM, -or Hybrid Care Leader-
### Assign based on the Services record:
#### Role = Chief Medical Officer - EM
####* When the Service Line’s Parent field = EM or UC
#### Role = Chief Medical Officer - HM
####* When the Service Line’s Parent field = HM
#### -Role = Hybrid Care Leader-
####* -When the Service Line’s Parent field = VH or CCARE-
## Comments = On the Services record, please review the recommended rates provided by recruiting & adjust as necessary. Then update the following fields within the “Info Due” section: “Service Line Coverage Model”, “Coverage Model Completed By”, & “Field Operations Leadership - Rate Approval”
## Related To = <Services>
# Subject: Update Clinical Rates - Recommended Rate(s)
## Assigned To = Deal Team Role: Recruiting Manager
## Comments = On the Services record, please update the following fields with your recommended clinical rates to be reviewed & approved by CMO: “Info Due” section: “MD/DO W2 Rates - Recommended”, “NPPA W2 Rates - Recommended”, “CPM Rate - Recommended”, “HPS Rate - Recommended”, “Sign-on bonus/Retention Bonuses”, & “Medical Director Stipend”
## Related To = <Services>

And all tasks are populated with:

# Record Type = Default
# Status = Open
# Priority = Normal
# Type = Info Due Process (NEW)
# Due Date = <date from field = “INFO DUE Date for All Inputs”>



NOTE: User(s) to manually close task once complete (Status = Completed) 		15/Sep/25 6:23 PM   5 image-20250813-202533.png 11/Aug/25 7:22 PM SCP Sprint 8, SCP Sprint 9 21/Aug/25 6:14 PM 1|i08pz4:qv 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM As a Sales VP, I want the system to automatically create task(s) for the Internal Info Due Process, so that the appropriate users get informed to inputed the Pro Forma Information. 03/Sep/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2240, PR1050558-2300, PR1050558-2356, PR1050558-2439, PR1050558-2440 * Data Dictionary - tab = Code Set, new field: “Shift Type”

* !image-20250829-154650.png|width=1169,height=756,alt="image-20250829-154650.png"! 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am an SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Service Account record
And I open a Contract (Client) record where Status = Draft
Then I am able to Specify Rates from the Summary tab

* When I select Type Of Rate = Shift
* Then I have to select a single Shift Type (required)
** NP/PA, MD/DO, RN/LPN
** If NP/PA is selected, display Employment Type field (required)
*** Employed, Other
* When I navigate to the next screen:
** Shifts are filtered according to the selected Shift Type
*** And filtered by NP/PA selection if applicable.
** Facility Titles are filtered according to the selected Shift Type
*** See attached PDF or [Health Cloud Records|https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1B6WddJnXHDZD5kx5F1mZDqEvcAwYn1wCPejZ0ZgJpP0/edit?gid=719228658#gid=719228658] sheet (Tab = Code Set (Facility Title))
** If NP/PA was selected and Employment Type = Employee, then Time Type is available

builds on functionality from [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1415|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1415|smart-link]

10/Sep/25 1:32 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Offboarding Accepted   Low BuildReviewComplete, TADesignComplete Kristi Bouillion   PR1050558-2678, PR1050558-4911, PR1050558-306, PR1050558-1653, PR1050558-1728, PR1050558-3384 Abhinav Mishra Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-1727
No permission
 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2303, PR1050558-2359, PR1050558-2489 As part of the guided offboardidng omniscript, create cases

Check if there are existing Case (of record type = Clinician Offboarding and Type = Facility) for the HPF record.
If NO, then create Case
Subject = "Facility Offboarding-<Account Name>"
Owner = Clinician experience Specialist from Account Team Role

One child case needs to be created per the sheet - Clinical Match
-In the same flow,- *-refer the sheet-* -and create other child cases per the conditions specified-
-For Contract Review child case,-
-When Clinician. Employment Type = Employee, Assign to HR Queue-
-All others, Transition Specialist Queue-
-Case.Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.Facility_Title__r.Code_Set_Sub_Type__c = ‘Employee’-

Do not create Claims Closeout and Facility-Level Access Removal child case



New fields to be created : {color:#bf2600}Rehirable{color} - To be added to DD [~accountid:712020:b8b82845-1665-49bb-bced-ce96d04329bd]
New Queues to be created : HR Queue, Transition Specialist Queue

Use the guided flow of offboarding and create the parent case based on the sheet,
where Contact.Status__c = Inactive
Query for Cases where ContactId = currentRecordId , Record Type = Clinician Offboarding, Type = SCP
If any record is found - do nothing
If no records found, then
Create Case
Subject = ‘SCP Offboarding’
Related To = ContactId (clinician)
Assigned = See [sheet|https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/14-PPkb2n7X13nbwyjKCH4jGUWAdaFpmlXYkoM_Rm2MM/edit?usp=sharing] 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a MSL or data quality team member in the Corporate Support apps
When the offboarding process is initiated as part of the guided experience [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-306|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-306|smart-link]
Then the following cases are created:

* SCP Offboarding (per clinician) - row 2 of [Clinician Offboarding Cases and Tasks sheet|https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/14-PPkb2n7X13nbwyjKCH4jGUWAdaFpmlXYkoM_Rm2MM/edit?usp=sharing]
** only when full SCP termination is selected
** IF Full SCP Termination is selected in the OmniScript, the case should be created with Full SCP Termination = TRUE
* Facility Offboarding (per HPF) - row 10 of [Clinician Offboarding Cases and Tasks sheet|https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/14-PPkb2n7X13nbwyjKCH4jGUWAdaFpmlXYkoM_Rm2MM/edit?usp=sharing]

* Assigned To = Data Quality Queue

* Type = Other
* Priority = Normal

Start Date (Required), End Date (optional)
In the OS, check if the facility title IS is Nurse Practitioner or Physician Assistant and if End date is not populated, then End Date is Start Date (that was entered) + 365.
Map these to StartDate, EndDate

Use the existing flow on Contract (that is used to change the status of contract to Executed)
Query for existing contract for the clinician (using current contract record’s AccountId)

Remove the older implementation of changing the status to Cancelled and Cancel Reason from PR1050558-1718 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Clinician record and open the Contract Request experience
Then I am able to:

* specify Start Date
** date field, required
* specify End Date
** date field, not required
** If End Date was not populated and facility title is Nurse Practitioner or Physician Assistant then End Date on *Contract and Provider Network Contract* is Start Date + 365 (able to handle leap year scenario)
** _Note: there is no business use case for an IC contract having NP/PA and other facility titles in the same contract_

* Currently Active/Original Contract
** End Date = 1 day before Start Date of newly executed contract
** only update when End Date is blank, do not override

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-2310, PR1050558-2366, PR1050558-2245 * Data Dictionary updates:
** See tab = Contract (Letter of Intent)
** Add fields
** update layout
* Update FLS for new fields for all permission sets with access to the object

!image-20250811-235942.png|width=765,height=736,alt="image-20250811-235942.png"! 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: create Letter of Intent (LOI) Request
Given I am a Sales VP in the Corporate Support Apps
When:

* Opportunity (RT: Growth Opportunity)
** Pro Forma Status = Model Confirmed or Approved for Contracting

Then from the Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth), the Sales VP has the ability to select the guided experience = “*Initiate Contracting Request*”

And user will be presented the option to select Contract Type Request = *Letter of Intent*
And the user will be presented with the following required fields:

* -Section Header: NDA Fields-
** -Proposed Effective Date [date]-
** -Name of Client Entity [text, 255]-
** -Address of Client Entity [text area, 255]-
* Section Header: Letter of Intent Fields
** Name of Client Representative LOI will be addressed to [text, 255]
** Client Address [text area, 255]
** Name of Client Entity [text, 255]
** Name of each Hospital [text area (long), 131,072]
** Location of each Hospital (City & State) [text area (long), 131,072]]
** Type of Services to be provided at each Hospital (EM/HM/ICU/Connected Care) [text, 255]
** Description of Services (i.e. HM & CC programs managed by SCP) [text, 255]
** Anticipated Start Date for Services [date]
** Proposed Term of Agreement (i.e. 3 years) [text, 255]
** Financial Terms (i.e. MG, subsidy, at risk money/incentive money, etc.) [text, 255]
** Other Key Terms & Assumptions (i.e. MOR/Governance/GME program, Malpractice limits, etc.) [text, 255]

And available navigation actions:

* Cancel/Exit
** Nothing is saved or created.
** Guided experience is closed
** User is returned to the Opportunity record
* Previous
** User is returned to the previous screen with selection retained.
* Finish (Next button)
** Guided experience is closed
** User is returned to the Opportunity record
** And the system shall create the Letter of Intent request for the Legal - Client Contracting team
*** Contract Record Type = Letter of Intent
*** Contract Owner = Opportunity’s Owner
*** Status = Draft
*** Account Name = <Opportunity’s Account Name>
*** Source Opportunity = <OpportunityID>
**** Link to Opportunity (user can view Pro Forma Model from the opportunity record)

AC2: Error message
Given I am a Sales VP in the Corporate Support Apps
When:

* Opportunity (RT: Growth Opportunity)
** Pro Forma Status ≠ Model Confirmed or Approved for Contracting

And from the Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth), if the Sales VP selects the guided experience = “*Initiate Contracting Request*”

And user will be presented the option to select Contract Type Request = *Letter of Intent*
And the user tries to finish/complete the guided experience
Then the system shall display an error message: Pro Forma Model must be in Status = “Model Confirmed” or “Approved for Contracting” to request a Letter of Intent.

AC3: Update Opportunity to LOI Executed
Given I am a Sales VP in the Corporate Support Apps
When the Letter of Intent Request is closed by the Legal - Client Contracting team [Contract Record Type = Letter of Intent is in Status = Executed
Then the system shall update field = “LOI Complete” to checked/true on the Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth). 		15/Sep/25 6:24 PM   4 Screenshot 2025-09-05 at 2.27.17 PM.png 05/Aug/25 4:51 PM SCP Sprint 8, SCP Sprint 9 21/Aug/25 6:02 PM 1|i08pz4:qz 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As as a Sales VP, I want a Letter of Intent (LOI) Request to be automatically generated and assigned to Legal - Client Contracting, so that they are triggered to create the Letter of Intent{color:#bf2600} {color}& can close the request when complete. 01/Sep/25

Client Contracting - “LOI Request”

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-2311, PR1050558-2367, PR1050558-2242 * AS part of this story add new field to Oppty = “Client Questionnaire Status”, see DD.
* Update FLS For new field for all permissions that have object access
* Story covers this part of the future state:

!image-20250812-185758.png|width=445,height=610,alt="image-20250812-185758.png"! 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Ability to *Add Client Discovery Questionnaire file & update status*
Given I am a Sales VP within the Corporate Support Apps
When I receive a new Client Discovery Questionnaire
And navigated to the Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth) record
Then from the Related tab (right region), related list = *Files* (related list added in story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-310|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-310|smart-link] )
I have the ability to add a new Client Discovery Questionnaire file
And I have the ability to manually update field *“Client Questionnaire Status” from “Not Received*”(default) to *“Assessment Submitted”*

AC2: Ability to update status to *Ready for Review, Info Due Process Ready*, or *Submission Incomplete*
Given I am a Sales VP within the Corporate Support Apps
When I navigate to a Opportunity (RT: Opportunity Growth) record with field “Client Questionnaire Status ” = Assessment Submitted
And I reviewed the Client Discovery Questionnaire file
Than I manually determine if the data is complete:

* If yes, then I am able to update the “Client Questionnaire Status” to “*Ready for Review*” or “*Info Due Process Ready*”
* If no, then I am able to update the “Client Questionnaire Status” to “*Submission Incomplete*”

AC3: Ability to *view* *all Ready for Review*
Given I am a user within the Corporate Support Apps that have access to Opportunity
When I navigate to the Opportunity tab
Then in list view = Ready for Review

* Filter: Record Type = Opportunity Growth, Client Questionnaire Status = Ready for Review
* Columns: Account Name, Opportunity Name, Target Contract Start Date, Closed Date, Count of All Services



NOTE:

* Info Due Process Ready will be on story [+PR1050558-1820+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1820]
* Info Due Process Ready - Task creation will be on story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1798|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1798|smart-link]
* Examples of Client Discovery Questionnaire files:
** [Client Discovery Questionnaire_CC-ICU_v8.2024.xlsx|https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/Shared%20Documents/Program%20Documentation/SCP%20SME%20Reference%20Material/SME%20Reference%20Material/Client%20Contracting/Client%20Discovery%20Questionnaire_CC-ICU_v8.2024.xlsx?d=w6aa046e8edc345eba5303ac32563d443&csf=1&web=1&e=AqEhEc]
** [Client Discovery Questionnaire_EM-HM_v8.2024.xlsx|https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/Shared%20Documents/Program%20Documentation/SCP%20SME%20Reference%20Material/SME%20Reference%20Material/Client%20Contracting/Client%20Discovery%20Questionnaire_EM-HM_v8.2024.xlsx?d=wa4231901c71341dda5124a5efeed7ce0&csf=1&web=1&e=TLMCG5] 		15/Sep/25 6:27 PM   5 Captura de pantalla 2025-08-28 a la(s) 1.41.27 p.m..png 05/Aug/25 4:32 PM SCP Sprint 8, SCP Sprint 9 14/Aug/25 11:13 AM 1|i08pz4:q 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Sales VP, when I capture the Client Discovery Questionnaire, I want the ability to capture and track, so can easily see where we are in the client questionnaire review process and have access to the Client Discovery Questionnaire in one location. 26/Aug/25

Client Needs Questionnaire - Data Collection

09/Sep/25 5:31 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider 360 Accepted   Low BuildReviewComplete, ReadyForSprint, TADesignComplete Ryan Woods   PR1050558-1334, PR1050558-888, PR1050558-889, PR1050558-1727, PR1050558-1728, PR1050558-1733 soomjeet.sahoo Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-1653
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1849, PR1050558-1905, PR1050558-2026 See split from stories for solutions. 0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project _Story Focus: Update At a Glance to support_ *_Offboarding_*

Split from Story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-889|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-889|smart-link]

Given a user of the system,
when I navigate to the *Person Account Clinician record At a Glance tab*,
Then I see a component with the following details:

* Titled “At a Glance” (see wireframe)
* A key/legend directly below it (see wireframe)
** Grey Circle Icon “Not Started”
** Blue + White Circle Icon “In Progress”
** Green Circle with Check Icon “Completed”
* Sections displaying “Section Header” values from the reference doc (“Status Label + Logic” tab - link below)
** Multiple Section Headers can be visible at the same time
** Sections have accordion feature (collapse / expand)
** Status/Label values (internal/external) visible nested under Section Headers only when section header is available
** Icons from the legend are available below the Status/Label value (see wireframe in the solution)
** In Onboarding and *Offboarding sections, Internal is visible above Facility*



Split from Story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-888|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-888|smart-link]

Given I a *SCP Corporate Support user* using the Corporate Support App,
When I navigate to a clinician’s Person Account record,
Then I am able to

* View “Status / Label (Internal)” under the Section Headers from the “Status Label + Logic” tab when a Section Header is visible
** Values in “Status / Label (External)” IS NOT VISIBLE TO INTERNAL USERS

Given I am *external Experience Cloud user*,
When I navigate to my home page,
Then *Offboarding* Section Header *& Status Labels are NOT displayed.*



Split from Story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1334|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1334|smart-link]

Given an *SCP Health user using the Corporate Support app*,
When I navigate to a clinician’s “At A Glance” / Pizza Tracker component on their Person Account page,
Then the data displayed is deduced / displayed leveraging the following logic:

* No actual records are displayed within the component
* Sections displaying “Section Header” values from the reference doc (“Status Label + Logic” tab - link below)
** Conditionally display and hide headers based on logic from reference doc (“Header Logic” tab - link below)
*** Section Header names will be concatenated to display what section is referring to (ex. Job Name or HPF Name) (“Header Logic” tab - link and example below)
** There will be a Section Header (“Applicant”) and subheaders that are collapsible with the section header concatenated nested under it (see example below - horizontal view)
** Multiple section headers can be visible at the same time (ex. Applicant, Active, Onboarding can all be visible simultaneously)
* If no logic is documented and Section Header is visible, default icon/value to “Not Started”
* Icon values (Not Started, In Progress, Completed) are dynamically displayed based on the Logic in linked Reference Doc (“Status Label + Logic” tab - columns F-H)
** Only one status per Status/Label are visible at a given time.
** The most “progressed” status is what is to be displayed
*** If Completed Logic = TRUE, display Completed icon
*** If In Progress Logic = TRUE and Completed = NOT TRUE, display In Progress icon
*** If Not Started Logic = TRUE OR (if no logic is documented AND Section Header is visible AND In Progress or Completed Logic = NOT TRUE), display Not Started icon

Given an *external user using Experience Cloud*,
when I navigate to my “At A Glance” / Pizza Tracker component on my home page,
Then the *Offboarding Section Header & Status Labels are NOT displayed.*


[Reference Document|https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/_layouts/15/Doc.aspx?sourcedoc=%7B33134674-E4BE-48B4-8030-9BA2976BB6CC%7D&file=SCP%20Health%20-%20HPF%20Pizza%20Tracker.xlsx&fromShare=true&action=default&mobileredirect=true]
[Wireframe|https://www.figma.com/design/FJWylko14sNox4yK7t0zrD/SCP-Health---Pizza-Tracker?node-id=0-1&p=f&t=VvuGg3fDOgjIscGF-0]



PIZZA TRACKER:

UI - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-889|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-889|smart-link]

Display Responsiveness - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-888|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-888|smart-link]

Status Logic - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1334|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1334|smart-link]

10/Sep/25 4:52 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Offboarding Accepted   Low TADesignComplete Kristi Bouillion   PR1050558-5863, PR1050558-2218, PR1050558-2223, PR1050558-2426, PR1050558-3992, PR1050558-1708, PR1050558-2436, PR1050558-5641, PR1050558-6314 tapas.dey Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-1580

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1854, PR1050558-1910, PR1050558-2049 single place for IT to adjust time from 12 months (ex. to 6 months)

Create an apex batch job that runs daily. It will query all related sites for the clinician and then look for the HPF’s belonging to that sites. If the Last Worked Date is more tahn a year and newer that the other ones we proceed to inactivate.

Batch job on HPF
Query for HPF where Status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive. Get related Clinician records as well
Filter HPF by the following
Today - HPF.Last_Date_Worked__c >=12 months

NOTE
For *A clinician has never worked*:_If Last Date Worked is blank, check the Company Signed Date (aka Effective Date) on the Contract records for all sister sites,_

Sister sites relationship are captured in Account Account relatioship
Look for active contract that are older than a year, then see if the last date worked is blank

Check the same conditions for all other sites (using the AAR relationship) .. and if they are true we update
If any one of them do not satisfy the conditions( meaning active contract older than a year, but have the last date worked populated) we break/skip the update



Query all case and *child cases* belong to the practitioner and close them.

Query all task and *task related to child cases related to cases, child cases and clinician* and close them. 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record
And I view a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record *where the following is true:*

* If the HPF Status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive
* *A clinician hasn’t worked in a year*:
** Last Date Worked (HPF) is more than 12 months away for all sister sites that a clinician works at (Account field on HPF where status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive)
* *A clinician has never worked*:
** If Last Date Worked (HPF) is blank, check the Company Signed Date (on Clinician Contract, aka Effective Date) on the Contract records for all sister sites
** If Last Date Worked (HPF) and Company Signed Date (Clinician Contract) are both blank, Hospital Privileged Date (HPF) is more than 12 months away for all sister sites

Then the HPF record is automatically updated with the following:

* Status = Inactive
* Credentialling Status = Inactive
* Termination Date = date when Last Date Worked is more than 12 months away

And the Clinician record is updated so that I-9 Status is blank

{color:#403294}*And all open cases, child cases, tasks related child cases, & tasks related to the clinician are updated to Status = Closed - built in* {color}[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2436|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2436|smart-link]{color:#403294} {color}

_Note: Conga agreement records are terminated based on Status change to Inactive, requires the Date of when the automated inactivation happened_ 		10/Sep/25 4:52 PM   7 image-20250821-105158.png 31/Jul/25 4:22 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 8, SCP Sprint 9 12/Aug/25 2:35 PM 1|i08pz4:qzzzzzzv 26/Mar/26 11:51 AM As a Data Quality team member, I need clinicians to be inactivated if they haven’t worked in 12 months, so that our clinician data is clean 21/Aug/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1858, PR1050558-1914, PR1050558-2048 {color:#bf2600}Need to fix the logic on {color}[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link]{color:#bf2600} to pull the Healthcare Payer network from Corporate entity instead from Person Account.{color}

Record Triggered Flow (use existing flow when exists): When the HPF Record is Created/ Updated

# *IF* HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Practitioner.Professional_Title__c = *MD or DO* AND HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Facility_Title__r.Code_Set_Sub_Type__c = *Employee*
## Get ID from PartyRoleRelation WHERE PartyRoleRelation.RoleName = EE Physician Contract Entity
## Query for AccountAccountRelation.AccountId = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.AccountId AND AccountAccountRelation.PartyRoleRelationId = Id from Step 1.a and Get *AccountAccountRelation.RelatedAccountId*
### When Record Found Update HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c = *AccountAccountRelation.RelatedAccountId*
### If No Record Found Do Nothing Exit
# *IF* HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Practitioner.Professional_Title__c = *NP or PA* AND HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Facility_Title__r.Code_Set_Sub_Type__c = *Employee*
## Get ID from PartyRoleRelation WHERE PartyRoleRelation.RoleName = EE NP/PA Contracting Entity
## Query for AccountAccountRelation.AccountId = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.AccountId AND AccountAccountRelation.PartyRoleRelationId = Id from Step 2.a
### When Record Found Update HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c = *AccountAccountRelation.RelatedAccountId*
### If No Record Found Do Nothing Exit
# *IF* HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Practitioner.Professional_Title__c = *RN or LPN* AND HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Facility_Title__r.Code_Set_Sub_Type__c = *Employee*
## Get ID from PartyRoleRelation WHERE PartyRoleRelation.RoleName = EE RN/LPN Contracting Entity
## Query for AccountAccountRelation.AccountId = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.AccountId AND AccountAccountRelation.PartyRoleRelationId = Id from Step 3.a
### When Record Found Update HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c = *AccountAccountRelation.RelatedAccountId*
### If No Record Found Do Nothing Exit
# *ELSE*
## Get ID from PartyRoleRelation WHERE PartyRoleRelation.RoleName = *Services Contracting Entity*
## Query for AccountAccountRelation.AccountId = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.AccountId AND AccountAccountRelation.PartyRoleRelationId = Id from Step 4.a
### When Record Found Update HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c = *AccountAccountRelation.RelatedAccountId*
### If No Record Found Do Nothing Exit



Update OWD:

* Public Read Only
** Healthcare Payer network
** Healthcare Provider
* Update Service Line



* Update Corporate Support permission set with Read access on Code Set object



Testing: Legal persona should be the one to setup the Corporate Entity and setup the Account Account Relationship 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter, Data Quality, or Enrollment Specialist user in the Corporate Support apps
When I create a HPF record (through automation from ATS Applicant or Create HPF experience)
Then the Healthcare Practitioner Facility record is populated with the *Contracting Corporate Entity* according to the logic below:

* Using the Facility Title on the HPF record, determine which Corporate Entity Account record to use. From the Account lookup on the HPF record, use Account Account Relationship to filter Service Account - Corporate Entity relationships based on the Party Role Relationships specified below:
** Clinician Professional Title = *MD or DO* AND Facility Title (Code Set Sub Type) equals *Employee*
*** Party Role Relationship = EE Physician Contract Entity
** Clinician Professional Title = *NP or PA* AND Facility Title (Code Set Sub Type) equals *Employee*
*** Party Role Relationship = EE NP/PA Contracting Entity
** Clinician Professional Title = *RN or LPN* AND Facility Title (Code Set Sub Type) equals *Employee*
*** Party Role Relationship = EE RN/LPN Contracting Entity
** *All others* (Professional Title 6 with Facility Title (Code Set Sub Type) ≠ *Employee*)
*** Party Role Relationship = Services Contracting Entity
** If Account Account Relationship is not found, Contracting Corporate Entity is blank

NOTE: Based on the update listed above, for story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link] we are now pulling the Healthcare Payer Network from Corporate Entity instead from Person Account.


Given I am a System Administrator

When I navigate to the OWD
Then the following objects shall be set to Public Read Write (internal only)

* Healthcare Payer Network (implemented in 1389)
* Healthcare Provider (implemented in 1389)
* Service Line 		28/Aug/25 12:22 PM   7 Captura de pantalla 2025-08-12 a la(s) 12.30.51 p.m..png 28/Jul/25 5:37 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 8 31/Jul/25 2:47 PM 1|i099yr:zzmzi 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Clinician Contracting Specialist, I need corporate entities to automatically be associated with clinicians and their potential facilities, so that I can create contracts with the right entities and limited manual effort 14/Aug/25

{color:#bf2600}NOTE from sakthi : Need to ensure we update the security, currently Portal User permission only has read access to tasks/activities/case.{color} 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Clinician with an open Intake Form case
When I log in to the Core Connect portal
Then I am able to navigate to the Home tab and see the To Do component [Assessment component to launch]
And I am able to populate the following:

* This form is only for clinicians where Employment Type is Employee (check HPF records where Status does not equal Inactive, Facility Title lookup has a Sub Type of Employee)

09/Sep/25 5:54 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Offboarding Accepted   Low TADesignComplete Ryan Woods   PR1050558-1745, PR1050558-2110, PR1050558-2594, PR1050558-883, PR1050558-1775, PR1050558-2081 muskan.jain Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-884

 Samantha Fried PR1050558-1867, PR1050558-1923, PR1050558-2032 Navigation
Clinician
Offboarding Case(SCP level)
Exit Interview (Child Task) - Button: Exit Interview

This button opens a Screen flow
Check if the user belongs to one (is a member of) of the Case team mentioned above.
NOTE: Case team members are copied from Account team per story PR1050558-883
if no : error message “You do not have access to create this record”
If yes, display the fields listed above are displayed.
The data mapping is provided in DD
On save, this creates a new Case of record type “Exit Interview”.
Add the members belong to the above account team role to a newly created Case team for this Exit Interview case record.

Persona : Users with Manage Clinician Recruiting permission set.

Replace Account team role *Chief Medical Officer* (CMO) with:

* *Chief Medical Officer - EM (NEW)*
* *Chief Medical Officer - HM (NEW)*
 0 Samantha Fried 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a RMO (Regional Medical Officer), DMO (Division Medical Officer), DOO (Division Operating Officer), CMO (Chief Medical Officer) in the Corporate Support apps

_Note: no validation needed on who can create an exit interview_

When I navigate to a clinician’s SCP Offboarding case
Then I can open the Exit Interview child task from the related tab (click path updated in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2237|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2237|smart-link] ), I can click “New Exit Interview” button from the header (only available when Subject = Exit Interview)
Then I am brought to an edit screen with access to following fields:

* Contact Name - set to Person Account (Clinician) the initial Case was related to, read only
* Case Owner - set to [Current User], read only
* Parent Case - set to SCP Offboarding case, read only
* Status - Not Started, In Progress, Closed
* Description - long text area

Then I click Save and the Exit Interview Case record is created :

* Subject: Exit Interview Notes
* other fields populated from entry above

Create page layout for Exit Interview case

NOTE: Per story [+2081 - Opportunity Team (Deal Team)+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2081] - *Chief Medical Officer* (CMO) Account Team role is being replace with:

* *Chief Medical Officer - EM (NEW)*
* *Chief Medical Officer - HM (NEW)* 		09/Sep/25 5:54 PM   10 14/Jul/25 4:26 PM SCP Sprint 8 31/Jul/25 11:44 AM 1|i099yr:zzmzzzzzzi 29/Jan/26 9:09 PM As a RMO, I need the ability to capture feedback from an exit interview initiated rom an offboarding case, so that when a clinician is offboarding, we’re able to gather feedback of the exit interview in a formal capacity. 01/Sep/25

 0 Jasmine Moradi 2 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Update to add Clinician record type and Administrative Start Date 15/Sep/25 2:09 PM   4 image (23).png 25/Jun/25 9:40 AM SCP Sprint 8, SCP Sprint 9 02/Sep/25 12:59 AM 1|i08pz4:qzzzzzzzzzzzzzzv 29/Jan/26 9:09 PM *As a* MuleSoft Integration Developer, *I need* Salesforce Change Data Capture (CDC) to trigger data transmission to MuleSoft *only when a Contract's Status becomes 'Executed' AND 'Hire Date' is populated for Contract's* where Employment Type = Employee or Independent Contractor, for the rest of Employment Type *Contract's Status becomes 'Executed'* *so that* downstream systems receive contract data at the precise, relevant stages of the contract lifecycle, ensuring data accuracy and efficient processing.
