 Kristin Koide PR1050558-2315, PR1050558-2371, PR1050558-2496 Experience cloud - home page - Links are already built as part of 204. Please update the links / verify the links mentioned in this story. Use flexcard to accommodate the visibility criteria
Visibility Conditions
HPF employment type - HPF > Facility Title > Code set subtype
Status - HPF. Status__c
Clinician Professional Status - (Account)Clinician.Professional_Status__c

Security Matrix updates for Permission set = Portal User:

* Read only for Person Account (Clinician)
* Read only for Code Set (Facility Title)
* Read only for HPF (should have already been implemented in 891)
* Read only for Contacts to fetch *clinician Professional Status field* 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am an Applicant who has been provisioned a prospect portal login
When I login to the prospect portal
Then I am able to see the following on the home page:

* SCP Resources - *visible for everyone*
** About SCP - [https://www.scphealth.com/about/scp-health-story/|https://www.scphealth.com/about/scp-health-story/|smart-link]
** Leadership Team - [https://www.scphealth.com/about/leadership-team/|https://www.scphealth.com/about/leadership-team/|smart-link]
** Advocacy - [https://www.scphealth.com/about/advocacy/|https://www.scphealth.com/about/advocacy/|smart-link]
** Case Studies- [https://www.scphealth.com/case-studies/|https://www.scphealth.com/case-studies/|smart-link]
** Podcast - [https://www.scphealth.com/podcast-rounds-with-scp/|https://www.scphealth.com/podcast-rounds-with-scp/|smart-link]
* Recruiting Tips - *visible for everyone*
** Interview Guide - [https://www.scphealth.com/resources/the-clinicians-guide-crushing-the-interview-landing-your-dream-job/|https://www.scphealth.com/resources/the-clinicians-guide-crushing-the-interview-landing-your-dream-job/|smart-link]
* Employed Information - *visible when HPF Facility Title has an employment type = Employee and Status not equal to Inactive*
** Employed Benefits - [https://www.scphealth.com/careers/clinical-education-training/|https://www.scphealth.com/careers/clinical-education-training/|smart-link]
** Visa Sponsorship Resources - [https://www.scphealth.com/careers/clinical-education-training/|https://www.scphealth.com/careers/clinical-education-training/|smart-link]
* *Contractor* Resources - *visible when HPF Facility Title has an employment type = Independent Contractor and Status not equal to Inactive*
** Financial Designs - [https://www.scphealth.com/careers/clinical-education-training/|https://www.scphealth.com/careers/clinical-education-training/|smart-link]
* Resident and Fellow Resources - *visible when clinician Professional Status = Resident or Fellowship*
** Residency Resource Program - [https://www.scphealth.com/careers/resident-careers/|https://www.scphealth.com/careers/resident-careers/|smart-link]

Links were built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-204|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-204|smart-link] - this story is to update visibility of the links and sections

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1876, PR1050558-1932, PR1050558-2029, PR1050558-2437 # Create a button *Open Shift APAY* in HealthcarePractitionerFacility object and add it to the record page
# Use Screen Flow
## Contract record: Contract.Status = ‘Executed’ and Contract.Employment_Type__c = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Facility_Title__r.Code_Set_Sub_Type__c LIMIT 1
### Store the Contract ID
## If No Record Found Then
## If Record Found Then
### Display Fields
#### Start Date/Time (date/time, required) (new field on Case data dictionary )
#### End Date/Time (date/time, required) (new field on Case data dictionary )
#### Shift Duration (Start Date/Time - End Date/Time) (new field on Case data dictionary )
#### Lists all records from PreventiveCareAgreement record with ContractPaymentAgreement.Type = Shift and user can choose one record
##### Name: PreventiveCareAgreement.Shift__r.Shift_Full_Name__c
### Next
### Show the select a Shift record with
#### Facility Rate: PreventiveCareAgreement.Facility Level Rate (new field on PreventiveCareAgreementsee data dictionary )
#### Clinician Rate: PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c
#### Remaining Open Shifts: (new field on Case data dictionary )
#### % of Clinicians Contracted to Work: (new field on Case data dictionary )
#### Reason for Shift Bonus (new field on Case data dictionary )
####* {color:#bf2600}we can use a picklist if there is a standard list of possible reasons{color}
#### Bonus Amount: (new field on Case data dictionary )
#### Bonus Unit of Measure : Picklist values: per Hour, per Shift (new field on Case data dictionary )
### Save
#### Create a Case Record with RT: Rate Approval, Type = Open Shift APAY and all fields as per Data Dictionary
##### Subject = Rate Approval
# Persona: *Scheduler & Clinician Experience Specialist,*
## Add Permission set = Manage Clinician Contracts
## Case Record Type = Rate Approval
### Permission set = Manage Clinician Onboarding



Note capturing date time and displaying the list of shift have no dependencies. Per the AC we don’t currently have filters. Display a list of Shifts from Clinician Contracts where status = Executed and Employment Type = Employment Type related to HPF Facility Title 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Clinician Experience Specialist or Scheduler in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record
Then I am able to select the *Open Shift APAY* button in the header
And the following displays: 

* Clinician Contracts where status = Executed and Employment Type = Employment Type related to HPF Facility Title
** When no records are available, display the following message “No Active Contract is Available for this Clinician”
* Shift Selection
** Shift Start Date/Time (date/time, required)
** Shift End Date/Time (date/time, required)
** Shift Duration (formula based on fields above)
** Once Start Date/Time and End Date/Time are populated:
*** Display a list of Shifts from Clinician Contracts where status = Executed and Employment Type = Employment Type related to HPF Facility Title
** _Navigation Options_
*** Next
* Incentive Details
** Display the Shift selected in previous screen
** Facility Rate (formula based on client contract, for the selected shift)
** Clinician Rate (formula based on clinician contract, for the selected shift)
** Remaining Open Shifts (number, required)
*** Help Text: How many remain after getting this shift request approved
** % of Clinicians Contracted to Work (percentage 3 digits and 0 decimal points, required)
*** Help Text: FSR %
** Reason for Shift Bonus (picklist, required)
*** Picklist values: Abrupt Removal of Provider, Admin Reasons, Call Off, Core Provider Needed, Higher Hourly Rate, Holiday Pay Extra, New Start-Up, Shift Travel-Expenses, Surge/Additional Coverage, Tiered Bonus
** Bonus Amount (currency 5 digits and 2 decimal points, required)
** Bonus Unit of Measure (picklist, required)
*** Picklist values: per Hour, per Shift
** Comments (free text, required)
** _Navigation Options_
*** Cancel (“X” icon)
**** Returns to Healthcare Practitioner Facility record and no Case records were created or updated
*** Previous
**** Returns to Shift Selection screen with the updates that the user made previously
*** Save
**** Creates new Case record as specified in the solution
***** Case Record Type = Rate Approval
***** Type = Open Shift APAY
**** Returns the user to the Healthcare Practitioner Facility record 		29/Aug/25 10:36 AM   7 12/Jun/25 6:35 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 8 10/Aug/25 12:17 PM 1|i099yr:zzj 08/Apr/26 5:08 PM As a Clinician Experience Specialist or Scheduler, I need to request shift-specific bonus approval in Salesforce, so that I can offer appropriate incentives for clinicians to work a hard-to-staff shift 18/Aug/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1515, PR1050558-1516, PR1050558-2515 * [link to current intake form|https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/Shared%20Documents/Forms/AllItems.aspx?id=%2Fteams%2FUnifiedPlatform%2DReGenesis%2FShared%20Documents%2FProgram%20Documentation%2FSCP%20SME%20Reference%20Material%2FSME%20Reference%20Material%2FCredentialing%2FIntake%20Form%20Packet%20Sample%2D%20sent%20by%20Recruiter%20via%20DocuSign%2Epdf&parent=%2Fteams%2FUnifiedPlatform%2DReGenesis%2FShared%20Documents%2FProgram%20Documentation%2FSCP%20SME%20Reference%20Material%2FSME%20Reference%20Material%2FCredentialing]
* Intake Form case
* used to contain discovery framework records
* clinician can only see OS when Status = Not Started or In Progress, is Status = Closed the OS is not visible
* populate Completed Date when all questions are answered
* populate Case lookup on Assessment
* {color:#bf2600}Need to ensure we update the security, currently Portal User permission only has read access to tasks/activities/case.{color}
* -Set Case Owner to the Customer Portal Users <Clinician User>-
* Security Matrix
** Tab = Permission Set
*** Perm Set = Portal User, add read to Object = Corporation and Tax Information 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Clinician with an open Intake Form case
When I log in to the Core Connect portal
Then I am able to navigate to the Home tab and see the To Do component [Assessment component to launch]
And I am able to edit/populate the following fields:

* Update My Information
** Legal Name (Account.Name) _includes Salutation, First Name, Middle Name, Last Name, and Suffix_
*** *Help Text: Please enter your Legal Name (as shown on your Social Security Card or other official documents). If you do not have a middle name, leave it blank.*
*** {color:#403294}*Change in Name creates a task for data quality - separate story* {color}[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2219|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2219|smart-link]
** Professional Title (Contact.Professional_Title__c)
** Maiden/Previous/Former Name (Contact.Maiden_Previous_Former_Name__c)
** Social Security Number (Contact.SSN_Encrypted__c) [Even if populated on contact, it will show blank in the portal]
** NPI (Contact.NPI__c) - {color:#403294}*creates a task for data quality queue - separate story* {color}[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2220|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2220|smart-link]
** Mobile (Contact.Mobile)
** Mailing Address (Contact.MailingAddress)
*** Street
*** City
*** State
*** Zip
** _Checkbox for Mailing Address same as Payroll Address_
** Payroll Address (Contact.OtherAddress) (if checkbox above is not checked)
*** Street
*** City
*** State
*** Zip
* DEA Information
** Display the following subtitle:
Due to changes in the DEA Registration verification process, we will need to know some information prior to querying the site. For the state you are anticipating working with us in, please list your DEA Registration information below and attach a copy to this form. If you do not have a DEA for this state yet, either list another state’s DEA Registration information or insert N/A into the fields below.
** DEA Number (Contact - text, 9)
** DEA State (Contact - picklist, values in DD)
** Issue Date (Contact - date)
* Corporation and Tax Information (only displayed when Employment Type = IC)
** Type (Corporation_and_Tax_Information__c.Type__c)
** Tax Classification (Corporation_and_Tax_Information__c.Tax_Classification__c)
** Corporation Name (Corporation_and_Tax_Information__c.Corporation_Name__c)
** Corporate Tax ID (Corporation_and_Tax_Information__c.Corporate_Tax_ID__c)
** Corporation Address (Corporation_and_Tax_Information__c.Corporation_Address__c)
** State of Incorporation (Corporation_and_Tax_Information__c.State_of_Incorporation__c)
